title: 海邊的樂章
lyrics_text:
[verse]
海風輕拂著臉旁的海水
小球在沙灘上飛舞跳躍
[chorus]
這裡是我們的樂園
與海洋共舞，在這片沙灘上放聲歌唱
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 4.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 7.", "Section [verse] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["聲調：避免連續相同聲調，注意每行第二、四字的平仄交替。", "押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
